name: patchpilot
description: An AI verified-fix agent that turns bug reports into failing regression tests, patches code, reruns tests, and writes repair reports.

scripts.quality: npm run build && npm test && npm run demo:offline && npm run start -- inspect-runs
scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/cli.js demo
scripts.demo:offline: npm run build && node dist/cli.js demo --offline
